name: issues parsed by extension are flagged with category equal to security in the resulting pattern record
command: mkdir -p fixtures && printf '{"number":1,"labels":["security"],"body":"x"}\n' > fixtures/issues.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/issue-tracker.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/issues.jsonl --emit patterns --out patterns.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"category":"security"' patterns.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
